main.description: Establishes a blackjack table. First record in any game. All players must agree on this before the game begins. One seat banks each round (rotating); the others wager against the banker's stack.

players.description: Player DIDs in seat order. A freshly-created open room may list only the host (length 1); the roster grows as the host admits joiners.

startingChips.description: Starting chip count for each player.

minBet.description: Minimum wager per round. Short stacks may wager all-in below it.

startedAt.description: Set by the host when the roster is locked and the game begins. Absent while the room is still open for joiners. Once present, players reference this record as the canonical table for the game.

updatedAt.description: Bumped periodically by a joining player while they wait to be admitted, so a host that missed the original join-request commit (dropped socket, late subscribe) discovers it from a later one.
